# UIAO Document Export Manifest

Generated by Quarto post-render pipeline.

## DOCX (13 files)

- `00_ControlPlaneArchitecture.docx` (16.0 KB)
- `00_CorePrinciples.docx` (11.9 KB)
- `01_UnifiedArchitecture.docx` (16.4 KB)
- `02_CanonSpecification.docx` (16.6 KB)
- `03_FedRAMP20x_Crosswalk.docx` (15.6 KB)
- `04_FedRAMP20x_Phase2_Summary.docx` (16.0 KB)
- `05_ManagementStack.docx` (16.0 KB)
- `06_ProgramVision.docx` (15.5 KB)
- `07_LeadershipBriefing.docx` (16.7 KB)
- `08_ModernizationTimeline.docx` (16.1 KB)
- `09_CrosswalkIndex.docx` (15.8 KB)
- `10_DirectoryStructure.docx` (15.2 KB)
- `11_GlossaryAndDefinitions.docx` (15.3 KB)

## HTML (13 files)

- `00_ControlPlaneArchitecture.html` (1841.2 KB)
- `00_CorePrinciples.html` (1820.2 KB)
- `01_UnifiedArchitecture.html` (1844.7 KB)
- `02_CanonSpecification.html` (1843.9 KB)
- `03_FedRAMP20x_Crosswalk.html` (1841.2 KB)
- `04_FedRAMP20x_Phase2_Summary.html` (1842.6 KB)
- `05_ManagementStack.html` (1843.0 KB)
- `06_ProgramVision.html` (1841.1 KB)
- `07_LeadershipBriefing.html` (1846.4 KB)
- `08_ModernizationTimeline.html` (1848.2 KB)
- `09_CrosswalkIndex.html` (1845.2 KB)
- `10_DirectoryStructure.html` (1838.7 KB)
- `11_GlossaryAndDefinitions.html` (1843.3 KB)

## MARKDOWN (13 files)

- `00_ControlPlaneArchitecture-gfm.md` (12.0 KB)
- `00_CorePrinciples-gfm.md` (2.2 KB)
- `01_UnifiedArchitecture-gfm.md` (13.6 KB)
- `02_CanonSpecification-gfm.md` (13.0 KB)
- `03_FedRAMP20x_Crosswalk-gfm.md` (12.1 KB)
- `04_FedRAMP20x_Phase2_Summary-gfm.md` (12.2 KB)
- `05_ManagementStack-gfm.md` (13.9 KB)
- `06_ProgramVision-gfm.md` (11.8 KB)
- `07_LeadershipBriefing-gfm.md` (14.4 KB)
- `08_ModernizationTimeline-gfm.md` (12.0 KB)
- `09_CrosswalkIndex-gfm.md` (13.5 KB)
- `10_DirectoryStructure-gfm.md` (10.9 KB)
- `11_GlossaryAndDefinitions-gfm.md` (12.3 KB)

## PDF (13 files)

- `00_ControlPlaneArchitecture.pdf` (56.1 KB)
- `00_CorePrinciples.pdf` (26.2 KB)
- `01_UnifiedArchitecture.pdf` (59.3 KB)
- `02_CanonSpecification.pdf` (57.9 KB)
- `03_FedRAMP20x_Crosswalk.pdf` (54.1 KB)
- `04_FedRAMP20x_Phase2_Summary.pdf` (60.9 KB)
- `05_ManagementStack.pdf` (53.5 KB)
- `06_ProgramVision.pdf` (53.1 KB)
- `07_LeadershipBriefing.pdf` (62.6 KB)
- `08_ModernizationTimeline.pdf` (54.7 KB)
- `09_CrosswalkIndex.pdf` (60.4 KB)
- `10_DirectoryStructure.pdf` (54.9 KB)
- `11_GlossaryAndDefinitions.pdf` (53.3 KB)

## PPTX (13 files)

- `00_ControlPlaneArchitecture.pptx` (45.6 KB)
- `00_CorePrinciples.pptx` (31.7 KB)
- `01_UnifiedArchitecture.pptx` (47.5 KB)
- `02_CanonSpecification.pptx` (48.1 KB)
- `03_FedRAMP20x_Crosswalk.pptx` (48.6 KB)
- `04_FedRAMP20x_Phase2_Summary.pptx` (45.5 KB)
- `05_ManagementStack.pptx` (51.6 KB)
- `06_ProgramVision.pptx` (45.1 KB)
- `07_LeadershipBriefing.pptx` (45.7 KB)
- `08_ModernizationTimeline.pptx` (43.8 KB)
- `09_CrosswalkIndex.pptx` (51.6 KB)
- `10_DirectoryStructure.pptx` (44.0 KB)
- `11_GlossaryAndDefinitions.pptx` (41.2 KB)
